name: Lethargic Sentience
description: Notes The firing pattern of this wand is identical to that of the Wand of the Bulwark. If the weapon is fired by a character with 31 Dexterity, one will be able to have 3 shots going on at the same time, and at the exact moment the first shot ends, the fourth one is fired.
effects: Shots are parametric Shots pass through obstacles
